mapper.select: SELECT ID, NAME, DESCRIPTION, VERSION, CACHE_SIZE, CACHE_POLICY, CREATED_DATE, UPDATED_DATE, VALUE_TYPE FROM LOOKUP_GROUP
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LOOKUP_GROUP (NAME, DESCRIPTION, VERSION, CACHE_SIZE, CACHE_POLICY, VALUE_TYPE) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{version}, #{cacheSize}, #{cachePolicy}, #{valueType})
mapper.update: UPDATE LOOKUP_GROUP SET NAME = #{name}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, VERSION = #{version}, CACHE_SIZE = #{cacheSize}, CACHE_POLICY = #{cachePolicy}, VALUE_TYPE = #{valueType}, UPDATED_DATE = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT GROUP_ID, JSON_INDEX_MODE, INDEXED_JSON_FIELDS FROM LOOKUP_GROUP_EXTRA
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LOOKUP_GROUP_EXTRA (GROUP_ID, JSON_INDEX_MODE, INDEXED_JSON_FIELDS) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{jsonIndexMode}, #{indexedJsonFields})
mapper.sql:
ORDER BY KEY_VALUE ASC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: MERGE ${tableName} AS t USING (SELECT #{keyValue} AS KEY_VALUE) AS s ON (t.KEY_VALUE = s.KEY_VALUE) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (KEY_VALUE, VALUE_DATA) VALUES (#{keyValue}, #{valueData});
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${tableName}
mapper.update: CREATE TABLE ${tableName} ( KEY_VALUE NVARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, VALUE_DATA NVARCHAR(MAX), CREATED_DATE DATETIME DEFAULT GETDATE(), UPDATED_DATE DATETIME DEFAULT GETDATE(), PRIMARY KEY (KEY_VALUE) )
IF OBJECT_ID('${tableName}', 'U') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE ${tableName};
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${tableName}
SELECT KEY_VALUE, VALUE_DATA, CREATED_DATE, UPDATED_DATE FROM ${tableName}
mapper.update: CREATE TABLE ${tableName} ( KEY_VALUE NVARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, VALUE_DATA NVARCHAR(MAX), CREATED_DATE DATETIME DEFAULT GETDATE(), UPDATED_DATE DATETIME DEFAULT GETDATE(), PRIMARY KEY (KEY_VALUE) )
mapper.insert: MERGE ${tableName} AS t USING (SELECT #{keyValue} AS KEY_VALUE) AS s ON (t.KEY_VALUE = s.KEY_VALUE) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (KEY_VALUE, VALUE_DATA) VALUES (#{keyValue}, #{valueData});
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${tableName}
SELECT KEY_VALUE, VALUE_DATA, CREATED_DATE, UPDATED_DATE FROM ${tableName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LOOKUP_STATISTICS ( GROUP_ID, TOTAL_LOOKUPS, CACHE_HITS, LAST_ACCESSED, RESET_DATE ) VALUES ( #{groupId}, 0, 0, NULL, NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE LOOKUP_STATISTICS SET TOTAL_LOOKUPS = 0, CACHE_HITS = 0, LAST_ACCESSED = NULL, RESET_DATE = #{resetDate} WHERE GROUP_ID = #{groupId}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM LOOKUP_AUDIT
WHERE GROUP_ID = #{groupId}
ORDER BY AUDIT_TIMESTAMP DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT * FROM LOOKUP_AUDIT
ORDER BY AUDIT_TIMESTAMP DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LOOKUP_AUDIT
